info.name: Socio Sim AI - Survey Testing
info.description: One question → get response → next question → get response. Use POST /survey for each question.

request.description: Generate a synthetic population. Run this first before any survey. Use smaller n (e.g. 50) for faster testing.
Ask → get response. Then run Question 2.

body.raw:
{
  "questions": [
    { "question": "How often do you use food delivery services? Options: Never, Rarely, Sometimes, Often, Very Often", "question_id": "q1_delivery_freq" },
    { "question": "What influences your decision to order delivery? Options: Convenience, Price, Variety, Reviews, Speed", "question_id": "q2_delivery_reason" },
    { "question": "Would you pay more for eco-friendly packaging? Options: Definitely Yes, Probably Yes, Neutral, Probably No, Definitely No", "question_id": "q3_eco_packaging" },
    { "question": "How satisfied are you with delivery apps in Dubai? Options: Very Satisfied, Satisfied, Neutral, Dissatisfied, Very Dissatisfied", "question_id": "q4_satisfaction" },
    { "question": "Do you prefer subscription plans or per-order pricing? Options: Subscription, Per-Order, Depends, No Preference", "question_id": "q5_pricing" },
    { "question": "How important is delivery speed to you? Options: Not Important, Slightly, Moderately, Very, Extremely", "question_id": "q6_speed" },
    { "question": "Would you try a new restaurant based on delivery app recommendations? Options: Yes Always, Often, Sometimes, Rarely, Never", "question_id": "q7_recommendations" },
    { "question": "What cuisine do you order most often for delivery? Options: Arabic, Indian, Asian, Western, Mixed", "question_id": "q8_cuisine" },
    { "question": "How would a 10% price increase affect your orders? Options: Stop ordering, Order much less, Order slightly less, No change, Would still order", "question_id": "q9_price_sensitivity" },
    { "question": "Do you use multiple delivery apps or stick to one? Options: One only, 2 apps, 3+ apps", "question_id": "q10_app_usage" }
  ],
  "use_archetypes": false,
  "social_influence_between_rounds": true,
  "summarize_every": 5
}

request.description: Run a multi-question survey. Returns session_id immediately; survey runs in background. Poll progress or get results when done. Add more questions to the 'questions' array as needed.
Check progress of a running multi-survey. Use the session_id from step 2. Poll every few seconds until status is 'completed'.
Get full results when multi-survey is completed. Returns all rounds with responses. Returns 409 if still running.
Get results for a specific round (0-indexed). Change '0' to 1, 2, 3... for other rounds.
